pathsTitle: Find your place in the community

seo.metaDescription: Rellia Health connects founders, clinicians, and health systems to build the future of care. Join our network and explore programs.
seo.ogDescription: Rellia Health connects founders, clinicians, and health systems to build the future of care. Join our network and explore programs.

subheadline: Rellia helps founders achieve their milestones to launch their healthcare innovations.

testimonials.companyInfo: NewGen Health is developing a novel-assay that is powered by AI to screen for early detection of chronic kidney disease transforming how and when care begins for 40 million people.
testimonials.name: Mazhar Shahen
testimonials.quote: Rellia has been an invaluable partner in our journey. Their regulatory expertise gave us the clarity and confidence to better understand Health Canada and FDA pathways as a health-tech startup. The team genuinely cares about helping early-stage companies succeed, not just with advice, but with hands-on support when it matters most.

testimonials.companyInfo: Syncara is a patient-first digital health platform designed to help Canadians organize, track, and manage their health records.
testimonials.name: Zarrah Uy
testimonials.quote: As an early-stage healthtech startup, Rellia gave us access to resources and people that would have otherwise been incredibly difficult to reach on our own, that access alone accelerated our work in such valuable ways.

testimonials.companyInfo: A rehabilitation-focused company bringing novel performance textiles and assistive solutions to support mobility, reduce injury risk, and enhance comfort during recovery for patients with musculoskeletal and neurological conditions.
testimonials.name: Dr. Sahil Khan
testimonials.quote: Rellia has been nothing short of exceptional- a truly dynamic incubator where early ventures are not only given space to grow, but are actively empowered to connect, refine, pitch, and evolve. The ecosystem is deeply professional, energizing, and genuinely supportive of innovation. Rellia is not just an incubator - it’s a launchpad for ambitious founders.

testimonials.companyInfo: An elder care platform to help assisted living, memory care, and specialized residential homes manage daily care, reporting, and family communication.
testimonials.name: Dhandre Weekes
testimonials.quote: Rellia is full of driven founders and healthcare innovators, which is actually where I connected with my advisory council members.

testimonials.companyInfo: HorminaCare provides virtual access to expert medical professionals for science-backed treatment for hormone-related conditions such as PCOS, adult acne, PMDD, and beyond.
testimonials.name: Melissa Williams
testimonials.quote: Being part of this group has been a great experience. Rellia has created a supportive space for health tech founders, with valuable resources and opportunities to connect.

testimonials.companyInfo: Digital Flow empowers entrepreneurs and small business owners through their digital transformation journey.
testimonials.name: Irene Saliandra
testimonials.quote: I've thoroughly enjoyed being part of the Rellia community—not only has it opened doors to expand my network, but also given me opportunities to test my ideas with like minded folks.

testimonials.companyInfo: Restore is an API that optimizes daily performance using chronobiology.
testimonials.name: Michelle Risinger
testimonials.quote: I've found the Rellia community full of smart, inclusive and generous members eager to provide support, connections and ideas.

testimonials.companyInfo: Roster is the first AI-native employee giving platform built specifically for health systems.
testimonials.name: Rafael Rodeiro
testimonials.quote: In a matter of days, Rellia was able to connect me with exactly the right people. Specific, high-quality introductions that would have taken me weeks to find on my own.

testimonials.companyInfo: MA Edtech Solutions helps immigrant children and their parents experience a better life in their country of residence.
testimonials.name: Nick Sabamehr
testimonials.quote: Rellia has been a big support in our journey from the first conversation, and we have built our strongest relationships through Rellia's support.

testimonials.companyInfo: Power of Play takes a play-based approach to pediatric rehabilitation
testimonials.name: Rooaa Shanshal
testimonials.quote: Being part of Rellia has been so incredibly valuable. Since joining, we've made real progress on building our QMS which is something that previously felt overwhelming.

testimonials.companyInfo: HerSay is an AI-powered doctor visit companion designed to help women feel seen, heard and prepared while navigating the healthcare system.
testimonials.name: Rebecca Lyons
testimonials.quote: Rellia has been a great resource for our team as we have navigated early stage validation and finding market fit.

children.text: Trusted by the next generation of

whyFeatures.description: Design the right product from the start by developing alongside healthcare practitioners
whyFeatures.title: The Clinicians

whyFeatures.description: Access 1:1 guidance from experts with years of experience scaling health tech businesses.
whyFeatures.title: The Advisors

whyFeatures.description: Warm introductions to health tech investors by a network that vouches for you. No cold decks required.
whyFeatures.title: The Investors

whyFeatures.description: Beta test your ideas, find an accountability buddy, cheer each other on, share your deepest worries. Connect with fellow health tech founders who are going through it all with you.
whyFeatures.title: The Community

whySectionDescription: It takes a village to raise a health tech company. All the people you need are waiting for you inside our programs.
